name: Affinity Bancshares, Inc.
business: Affinity Bancshares, Inc. is a bank holding company that offers a range of loan products including commercial real estate, consumer, construction, residential real estate, and commercial and industrial loans. It also provides various deposit accounts such as checking, money market, savings, and certificates of deposit. The company serves individuals, businesses, and consumers.

exposures.sentence: One-to-four family residential real estate loans decreased $6.2 million, or 11.4%, to $48.0 million at December 31, 2025 from $54.1 million at December 31, 2024.

The growth in savings is attributed to the opening of additional FitnessBank accounts, the timing of our rate adjustments relative to competitors, as well as an increase in the advertisement of rates.
